missions.name: Deep-Space Navigation Beacon
missions.description: A deep-space nav beacon at the edge of the Kuiper is drifting off-frequency. EVA over and manually tune the reference cavity.

missions.name: Triton Telescope Servicing
missions.description: The Triton-orbiting telescope's primary mirror actuator froze. Spacewalk to the optics bay and release the stuck drive.

missions.name: Orbital Asset Servicing
missions.description: On-orbit asset is throwing faults across multiple subsystems. Diagnostics inconclusive — EVA out, find the broken parts, patch them in place.

missions.name: Kuiper-Edge Telescope Phasing
missions.description: The Kuiper-edge survey scope drifted out of phase from cosmic-ray bombardment. EVA, read the wavefront sensor, walk each segment in by hand.
